zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun於大約1080年出生在法國崔艾-吉洛易a奧度時，他的父親Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun40歲，母親Agnes de Fréteval16歲。他於大約1100年與Havoise de Mondoubleau在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1140年4月12日在法國崔艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun于大约1080年出生在法国崔艾-吉洛易a奧度时，他的父亲Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun40岁，母亲Agnes de Fréteval16岁。他于大约1100年与Havoise de Mondoubleau在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1140年4月12日在法国崔艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun was born about 1080, in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, his father, Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun, was 40 and his mother, Agnes de Fréteval, was 16. He married Havoise de Mondoubleau about 1100, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 April 1140, in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun est né environ 1080, à Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, son père, Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Fréteval, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Havoise de Mondoubleau environ 1100, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1140, à Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun um 1080 in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun 40 und seine Mutter Agnes de Fréteval 16. Er hat um 1100 in Frankreich Havoise de Mondoubleau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. April 1140 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun è nato il circa 1080 nel Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Fréteval, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Havoise de Mondoubleau circa 1100, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 aprile 1140, nel Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudunが約1080年にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルチaテアウダンで生まれた時，父Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudunは40歳，母Agnes de Frétevalは16歳であった。約1100年にフランスでHavoise de Mondoubleauと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1140年4月12日にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルチャートレスで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 cha테오던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Fréteval(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1100년 프랑스에서 Havoise de Mondoubleau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1140년 4월 12일 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 처트레스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, seu pai, Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Fréteval, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Havoise de Mondoubleau aproximadamente 1100, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1140, em Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun родился около 1080 г. в местности чaтодун, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Fréteval, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Havoise de Mondoubleau около 1100 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 апреля 1140 г. в местности чартресь, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun nació aproximadamente 1080, en Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, su papá, Hugh IV Viscount of Châteaudun, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes de Fréteval, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Havoise de Mondoubleau aproximadamente 1100, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de abril de 1140, en Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
